title: Yossi Matias on the golden age of research
summary: Yossi Matias, VP and Head of Google Research, discusses the "magic cycle" of research from breakthrough to real-world impact. The conversation covers AI tools for scientific discovery, flood forecasting, medical models, and quantum computing, with examples including Co-Scientist, ERA, and the Willow chip.
writeup: Yossi Matias, VP and Head of Google Research, frames a "magic cycle" that moves research from breakthrough to real-world impact. The discussion spans AI tools for scientific discovery, flood forecasting, medical models, and quantum computing, citing Co-Scientist, ERA, and the Willow chip as examples. It connects underlying methods, including speculative decoding, generative AI, test-time compute, and quantum gates, to applied outcomes across these domains.
